name: hse-core
description: NZ/AU workplace health & safety Claude Agent Skills — an orchestrator plus specialists for critical risk, governance, NZ/AU duties, high-risk work, investigation and procedures, prosecution learning, a full tier of hazard subject-matter experts, and sector specialists (construction, transport & logistics, manufacturing, agriculture, horticulture, forestry, electricity supply, mining & quarrying, fishing & aquaculture, maritime & ports, healthcare, waste & recycling, and more).
